gt_sql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT d.forename, d.surname FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId WHERE r.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1
question: Which driver created the fastest lap speed in a Formula_1 race? Please give both his forename and surname.
